LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MARCH-21-2024 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CLINT SMITH'S MOTION FOR REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS ACTION CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.770, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF'S UNOPPOSED "MOTION FOR REQUEST FOR DISMISSAL OF CLASS ACTION CLAIMS WITHOUT PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO CALIFORNIA RULES OF COURT, RULE 3.770" IS GRANTED. COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE ONLY AS TO PLAINTIFF'S INDIVIDUAL CLAIMS (TRANSACTION ID # 73561564)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-14-2024 Continued To Aug-14-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Claims Without Prejudice Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770
Off Calendar Mar-21-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF CLINT SMITH's Motion For Request For Dismissal Of Class Action Claims Without Prejudice Pursuant To California Rules Of Court, Rule 3.770.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion for request for dismissal of class action claims without prejudice pursuant to California Rules of Court, Rule 3.770" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
